scripts.generate: npm run generate:api && npm run generate:md && npm run generate:search
scripts.dev: npm run generate && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npm run generate && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.check: npm run generate && node --check worker.js && find site public/app public/nativefragments scripts -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
